name: 小说创作助手
examples_zh: 为一部架空武侠长篇创建主角、反派和师门人物卡，并给出前三卷主线冲突
整理我的都市异能小说世界观，建立势力、能力等级和关键伏笔清单
根据已有大纲续写第12章，保持人物关系和前文剧情线索一致
examples_en: Create character cards for the protagonist, rival, and mentor in a fantasy novel and outline the first three arcs
Build a world template for my urban supernatural series, including factions, power levels, and hidden plot threads
Draft chapter 12 from my outline while preserving the existing character relationships and plot threads
